title.en: But even so, he felt that he could not resist f...

content.en:
"Who's going to save me?"

Wu Zhan was terrified, and in order to save his own life, he had already used many life-saving things, as well as overloading the power of the wasteland to protect himself.

But even so, he felt that he could not resist for much longer.

Time passed by seconds, and Wu Zhan always felt that he would be killed in the next second.

Just as he was about to die, a voice came.

"Alien race, dare to slaughter the creatures of the wasteland, looking for death!"

Hearing this voice, Wu Zhan had a glimmer of hope in his heart.

"Someone came to my rescue!"

Wu Zhan thought to himself.

He sensed it in an instant, saw a cosmic god, and his mood instantly cooled.

He knew this cosmic god, he was a cosmic god of the upper clan, and his strength was much weaker than him, how could he save him!

This cosmic god is also sent to death!

"It's over!"

Wu Zhan said in despair.

And the Upper Race Universe God was also dumbfounded, and those innate gods told him that there was a foreign race here slaughtering the creatures of the Desolate Realm, and asked him to kill this foreign race.

He came happily, but he never expected to see this scene.

"Desolate Demon Martial Arts, his strength is stronger than mine, he is about to fall into the hands of aliens, where am I an opponent!"

He knew that he had been deceived by those innate gods, and this alien race was not something he could provoke at all!

However, he had to make a move!

The desolate demon can't die in martial arts, if he escapes now, those innate gods will definitely not let him go, and even his relatives are in danger.

If you save the desolate demon martial arts, it will be a great credit!

Besides, those innate gods also said it, and other cosmic gods also rushed over, so he didn't have no hope of living.

"Let go of the Martial Arts, the God of the Universe!"

The Shang Clan Universe God made a move, trying to stop Ye Tian from attacking Ye Tian to attack and kill the martial arts.

But at this moment, Ye Tian used the power of space to block the attack of the Universe God of the Shang Clan, and immediately grabbed Wu Zhan with one hand.

"Chaos Void Palm!"

This move was a chaotic true technique created by Ye Tian not long ago, and it could suppress the enemy in the Void Mina Realm in the palm of his hand.

The power of the Chaos Void Palm is more powerful than the Void Palm, I don't know how many times, if it is a martial war in its heyday, it can definitely block the Chaos Void Palm, but now the seriously injured and dying martial arts can not resist.

Shout!

Wu Zhan was captured by Ye Tian and suppressed in the palm of his hand.

"An ordinary cosmic god dares to stop me and look for death!"

Ye Tian teleported over, holding the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky, and pierced through with a fierce spear.

The Shang Clan Cosmic God tried to dodge, but he was still affected by the talent of time, and he couldn't dodge at all.

Poof!

The Upper Universe God was seriously injured.

"Not good!"

The Upper Universe God was horrified.

He never expected Ye Tian's strength to be so terrifying, he didn't even have the ability to block a move, the gap between his strength and Ye Tian was too big!

chased and fled, and before half a minute, this Upper Clan Cosmic God was completely killed by Ye Tian in this void.

And Wu Zhan was also killed by Ye Tianzhen in the palm of his hand, and he completely fell and died.

At the moment when Wu Zhan fell, the voices and roars of the cosmic gods came from the void.

"Alien, if you dare to kill a desolate demon, you will die!"

"The Desolate Demon Clan is the largest clan in the Desolate Realm, with a small number of people and high potential, it is a race created by Desolate Zun, and it is also the most proud child of Desolate Zun. You've angered everyone, and you'll never be able to get out of the wasteland!"

"Alien, you are going to die! Not only you are going to die, but all other aliens in the wasteland are going to die!"

......

Ye Tian glanced up and sneered: "Then I'll wait!"

The threat of the innate gods is undoubtedly ridiculous, do you really think it will be so easy to kill him?

And it is not so simple to kill all the strong people of all races in the outside world.

There are a lot of galaxy-level and galaxy-level people who have entered this time, and they are located everywhere, and they all carry a lot of secret treasures, and their combat effectiveness is not weak.

The various clans in the Desolate Realm are not united, and those lower clans and even some of the upper clans are also afraid of death, and it is impossible to kill one clan at all costs.

If you really do it, it will definitely be the wasteland that will suffer the heavy losses.

Compared with the races in the universe, it doesn't matter at all to lose some inconsequential galaxy-level and galaxy-level, but the wasteland can't afford to lose it.

At this time, the threat of the innate gods is more like a gaffe and a manifestation of incompetence!

"Huh!"

Ye Tian quickly flew away and left this area.

Immediately.

Ye Tian infiltrated a city, disguised himself as a desolate creature and left the city, trying to avoid the detection of the innate gods through various escape secret techniques.

Of course, he also knew that he couldn't really hide from the detection of the innate gods, but he only needed to hide for a while.

Wasteland, somewhere deep in the mountains.

Ye Tian retreated and fused the Desolate Pattern Talent, once he fused the Desolate Pattern Talent, he could skyrocket his strength in the Desolate Realm, and his life-saving ability would increase even more at that time.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tianyi thought about it and began to fuse.

Half an hour passed quickly, and Ye Tian successfully fused the Wild Pattern Talent.

Then, Ye Tian truly understood the usefulness of the Desolate Pattern talent.

"The Desolate Pattern talent turned out to be the use of this talent to attract a trace of the origin of the Desolate Realm, so as to mobilize the power of the Desolate Realm, which can increase the combat power by up to ten times!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

His strength is already very strong, and if he increases his combat power by ten times, he will definitely be comparable to the best among the gods of the universe.

"No wonder the Divine Blade Supreme asked me to be careful of the desolate demons in the desolate realm, fortunately, the desolate demons I encountered this time are not strong, otherwise when I encounter a powerful cosmic god desolate demon, even if I have a death flower emperor and a perverted ability to save my life, but if the other party traps me, I won't be able to escape!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Wildline talent, open!"

Ye Tian instantly opened the Desolate Pattern Talent and attracted a trace of the Desolate Realm Origin.

In an instant, Ye Tian felt that the heavens and the earth were different, as if everything was in his own hands, and he could mobilize the power of the wasteland to bless himself at any time, and even attack the enemy and protect himself.

Just as Ye Tian was indulging in the Desolate Pattern Talent, he suddenly felt a wave of more powerful Desolate Realm power sweeping over.

"It's those innate gods!"

Ye Tian inducted.

I saw that these desolate realm powers quickly locked him, if he hadn't fused the desolate pattern talent before, Ye Tian would not have been able to sense the power of the desolate realm, and there would be no way to know that he was locked by these innate gods.

But now, with the talent of the desolate pattern, he can dodge at any time to avoid being locked by the innate gods of the desolate realm.

"It's time to leave, this place has been discovered!"

Ye Tian fled again.

It didn't take long for a powerful desolate demon to descend here, but he didn't find Ye Tian.

In the next few days, these innate gods tried to find Ye Tian, but each time they failed.

this day.

The innate gods began to have a heated discussion.

"What's going on, why can't I find that alien every time?"

"It's strange, we used the power of the wasteland to search for that alien race, we should confirm that it was incomparable, why did the other party leave smoothly every time, as if we knew that we were going to send someone there. "

"Have you noticed that there is a faint aura of desolate origin on that alien race?"

"Hey, you found out too, I thought it was a delusion!"

During this discussion, one by one the innate gods were stunned.

Soon, they confirmed that Ye Tian had the aura of the origin of the desolate realm on his body, and this discovery stunned them all.

In the end, they guessed that Ye Tian might have a special secret treasure on his body, which came from the Desolate Realm, but was seized by outsiders. And this secret treasure can sense their detection, so it can easily escape every time.

There is also a possibility, that is, there is a desolate demon hiding on Ye Tian's body to help Ye Tian escape.

As for Ye Tian having the talent of the desolate pattern, they would never dare to imagine it, after all, the talent of the desolate pattern is only possessed by the desolate demons, and other alien races and even those of the upper clans of the desolate realm cannot have it.

Ye Tian couldn't be hunted down, and after a long time, these innate gods gave up, and could only tell all ethnic groups to strengthen their vigilance.
